name: python3-pcodedmp
title: python3-pcodedmp
description:
VBA p-code disassembler
Macros written in VBA (Visual Basic for Applications; the macro programming
language used in Microsoft Office) exist in three different executable forms,
each of which can be what is actually executed at run time, depending on the
circumstances: Source code, p-code and execodes.
.
Since most of the time it is the p-code that determines what exactly a macro
would do (even if neither source code, nor execodes are present), pcodedmp is
a Python library and command line tool to display it.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pcodedmp because VBA p-code disassembler.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pcodedmp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pcodedmp [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pcodedmp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pcodedmp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pcodedmp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
